# immich_asset (Resource)

Manages an Immich asset's metadata. Note: This resource does not support uploading files. It is intended for managing metadata of existing assets.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "immich_asset" "example" {
  id          = "your-asset-uuid"
  is_favorite = true
  is_archived = false
  description = "A beautiful sunset"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the asset.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the asset.
- `is_archived` (Boolean) Whether the asset is archived.
- `is_favorite` (Boolean) Whether the asset is marked as a favorite.
- `latitude` (Number) Latitude of the asset.
- `longitude` (Number) Longitude of the asset.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

### OpenTofu Import Block (Recommended)

```terraform
import {
  to = immich_asset.example
  id = "your-asset-uuid"
}
```

### CLI Import

```terraform
tofu import immich_asset.example your-asset-uuid
```
